item.title: TOMY Recalls Boon PIVOT Collapsible Toddler Tower Kitchen Step Stools Due to Risk of Serious Injury and Death from Tip-Over and Fall Hazards
item.company: Online at Target.com, Amazon.com and Babylist.com from January 2023 through June 2026 for around $150.
item.brand: Online at Target.com, Amazon.com and Babylist.com from January 2023 through June 2026 for around $150.
item.product: Boon PIVOT Collapsible Toddler Tower Kitchen Step Stools
item.summary: This recall involves Boon PIVOT Toddler Tower Kids Kitchen Step Stools. The metal and plastic tower stools were sold in gray and white and measure about 22 inches wide, 23 inches deep, and 35 inches tall. "boon" is visible along the top rail, and a warning label is visible along the side of the standing platform.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Boon PIVOT Collapsible Toddler Tower Kitchen Step Stools.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled tower stools immediately and store them away from children until repaired. Contact TOMY for a stabilizing repair part and installation instructions. The firm will mail the free repair parts directly to consumers.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
